assessment.note: She sounds generally settling in but is still expending effort decoding 'unwritten rules in every meeting,' which also flags an off-signature clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Unwritten rules
new_queue.name: When you say 'unwritten rules in every meeting,' what are you still trying to read?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific hidden norms she is decoding so the manager can remove ambiguity.

new_queue.label: Decision boundaries
new_queue.name: Where do the decision boundaries still feel fuzzy in your PM scope?
new_queue.description: Surfaces which calls she is unsure she can make versus where she needs alignment.

new_queue.label: Cross-functional moments
new_queue.name: Which cross-functional moments still slow you down the most?
new_queue.description: Finds the specific meeting or interaction patterns where uncertainty shows up.

new_queue.label: Alignment friction
new_queue.name: What part of running alignment is taking more effort than it should?
new_queue.description: Identifies where she is over-investing in consensus or decoding norms.

new_queue.label: Support from me
new_queue.name: Where would a clearer call from me help you most?
new_queue.description: Makes room for concrete manager support on boundaries and escalation.

new_queue.label: Next support
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Ends on practical next steps and support needed to make onboarding smoother.
